headline: Lawsuit Over Underage Gambling Tests Coinbase Compliance And Valuation Story
summary: A new lawsuit claims Coinbase Global (NasdaqGS:COIN) enabled and profited from illegal underage online gambling. The complaint alleges weaknesses in Coinbase's compliance and anti money laundering controls that allowed minors to move funds to gambling sites. The case focuses on personal harm to vulnerable users and potential gaps in Coinbase's monitoring of platform activity. Coinbase runs a large cryptocurrency trading and custody platform that sits at the intersection of retail investors,...
